commands.name: 进入配置模式
commands.description: 进入配置模式（所有配置操作需在此模式）

commands.name: 接口设为Access模式
commands.syntax:
set interfaces <interface> unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode access
  set interfaces <interface> unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members <vlan>
commands.example:
set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode access
  set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members Management
commands.description: 将接口设为Access模式并加入VLAN

commands.name: 接口设为Trunk模式
commands.syntax:
set interfaces <interface> unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode trunk
  set interfaces <interface> unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members [<vlans>]
commands.example:
set interfaces ge-0/0/0 unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode trunk
  set interfaces ge-0/0/0 unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members [Management Production]
commands.description: 将接口设为Trunk模式并允许VLAN通过

commands.name: 创建IRB接口（SVI）
commands.syntax: set interfaces irb unit <id> family inet address <ip>/<prefix>
commands.example: set interfaces irb unit 10 family inet address 192.168.10.1/24
commands.description: 创建集成路由桥接接口（等同于Cisco SVI）

commands.name: 查看接口VLAN
commands.description: 查看接口的二层交换信息

commands.name: 配置MSTP
commands.syntax:
set protocols mstp configuration-name <name>
  set protocols mstp revision-level <level>
  set protocols mstp interface <interface>
commands.example:
set protocols mstp configuration-name REGION1
  set protocols mstp revision-level 1

commands.name: 接口边缘端口
commands.example: set protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 edge

commands.name: BPDU保护
commands.description: 边缘端口收到BPDU则关闭端口

commands.name: 创建LAG接口
commands.syntax:
set interfaces <aeX> aggregated-ether-options minimum-links <n>
  set interfaces <aeX> aggregated-ether-options link-speed <speed>

commands.name: 加入LAG组
commands.description: 将物理接口加入LAG组（LACP模式）

commands.name: 设置LACP周期
commands.example: set interfaces ae0 aggregated-ether-options lacp periodic fast

commands.name: 设置负载均衡
commands.syntax: set policy-options policy-statement <name> then load-balance per-packet
commands.example: set policy-options policy-statement LB then load-balance per-packet
commands.description: 通过策略配置负载均衡

commands.name: 启用OSPF
commands.example:
set protocols ospf area 0.0.0.0 interface lo0.0 passive
  set protocols ospf area 0.0.0.0 interface ge-0/0/0.0

commands.name: OSPF被动接口
commands.syntax: set protocols ospf area <area> interface <intf> passive
commands.example: set protocols ospf area 0.0.0.0 interface ge-0/0/1.0 passive

commands.name: 启用BGP
commands.syntax:
set protocols bgp group <group_name> type {internal|external}
  set protocols bgp group <group_name> local-address <ip>
  set protocols bgp group <group_name> peer-as <as>
  set protocols bgp group <group_name> neighbor <ip>
commands.example:
set protocols bgp group EBGP type external
  set protocols bgp group EBGP peer-as 65002
  set protocols bgp group EBGP neighbor 10.1.1.2
commands.description: 配置BGP对等体（Junos分组配置风格）

commands.name: 创建防火墙过滤器
commands.syntax:
set firewall family inet filter <name> term <term_name> from ...
  set firewall family inet filter <name> term <term_name> then ...
commands.example:
set firewall family inet filter BLOCK_WEB term 1 from source-address 192.168.1.0/24
  set firewall family inet filter BLOCK_WEB term 1 from destination-port 80
  set firewall family inet filter BLOCK_WEB term 1 then discard
commands.description: 创建防火墙过滤器（Junos无ACL，用Firewall Filter）

commands.name: 默认拒绝规则
commands.syntax: set firewall family inet filter <name> term <last> then {accept|discard|reject}
commands.example: set firewall family inet filter BLOCK_WEB term LAST then accept

commands.name: 接口应用过滤器
commands.syntax: set interfaces <interface> unit <n> family inet filter {input|output} <filter_name>
commands.example: set interfaces ge-0/0/0 unit 0 family inet filter input BLOCK_WEB
commands.description: 在接口方向应用防火墙过滤器

commands.name: 创建前缀列表
commands.description: 创建前缀列表用于路由过滤

commands.name: 路由策略（Route Policy）
commands.syntax:
set policy-options policy-statement <name> term <n> from ...
  set policy-options policy-statement <name> term <n> then ...
commands.example:
set policy-options policy-statement REJECT-RFC1918 term 1 from prefix-list RFC1918
  set policy-options policy-statement REJECT-RFC1918 term 1 then reject
commands.description: 创建路由策略用于路由过滤

commands.name: 查看过滤器
commands.description: 查看防火墙过滤器规则

commands.name: 配置DHCP服务器
commands.syntax: set system services dhcp-local-server group <group> interface <intf>
commands.example: set system services dhcp-local-server group LAN interface irb.10

commands.name: 创建地址池
commands.syntax:
set access address-assignment pool <name> family inet network <prefix>
  set access address-assignment pool <name> family inet range <rname> low <low> high <high>
commands.example:
set access address-assignment pool VLAN10 family inet network 192.168.1.0/24
  set access address-assignment pool VLAN10 family inet range r1 low 192.168.1.10 high 192.168.1.250

commands.name: 配置网关和DNS
commands.syntax:
set access address-assignment pool <name> family inet dhcp-attributes router <ip>
  set access address-assignment pool <name> family inet dhcp-attributes name-server <ip>
commands.example:
set access address-assignment pool VLAN10 family inet dhcp-attributes router 192.168.1.1
  set access address-assignment pool VLAN10 family inet dhcp-attributes name-server 8.8.8.8

commands.name: 创建VRRP组
commands.syntax: set interfaces <interface> unit <n> family inet address <ip>/<prefix> vrrp-group <id> virtual-address <ip>
commands.example: set interfaces ge-0/0/0 unit 0 family inet address 192.168.1.1/24 vrrp-group 1 virtual-address 192.168.1.254

commands.name: 设置优先级
commands.syntax: set interfaces <interface> unit <n> family inet address <ip> vrrp-group <id> priority <1-255>
commands.example: set interfaces ge-0/0/0 unit 0 family inet address 192.168.1.1/24 vrrp-group 1 priority 120

commands.name: 抢占模式
commands.syntax: set interfaces <interface> family inet address <ip> vrrp-group <id> preempt
commands.example: set interfaces ge-0/0/0 unit 0 family inet address 192.168.1.1/24 vrrp-group 1 preempt

commands.name: 配置管理IP
commands.syntax: set interfaces <interface> unit 0 family inet address <ip>/<prefix>
commands.example: set interfaces fxp0 unit 0 family inet address 192.168.1.1/24

commands.name: 配置SSH
commands.syntax: set system services ssh root-login deny

commands.name: 创建用户
commands.syntax: set system login user <user> class super-user authentication plain-text-password
commands.example: set system login user admin class super-user authentication plain-text-password

commands.name: 配置SNMP
commands.example: set snmp community public authorization read-only

commands.name: 配置Syslog
commands.syntax: set system syslog host <ip> any any
commands.example: set system syslog host 192.168.1.200 any any

commands.name: 提交配置
commands.description: 提交配置（confirmed=自动回滚，Junos关键特性）

commands.name: 回滚配置
commands.description: 回滚到之前的配置版本（Junos独有特性）

commands.name: 查看配置
commands.description: 查看当前配置（set格式更直观）

commands.name: 接口命名规范
commands.example: ge-0/0/0 = 第一个槽位, 端口0, 子端口0
commands.description: Junos接口命名：类型-槽位/端口/子端口，与Cisco完全不同
